description: Research npm packages by metadata, downloads, maintainers, freshness, and dependency risk.

novel_features.name: Package summary
novel_features.description: Summarize an npm package with latest version, maintainers, dependencies, publish freshness, and last-month downloads.

novel_features.name: Package comparison
novel_features.description: Compare npm packages by adoption, freshness, maintainers, and dependency surface.

novel_features.name: Package risk scoring
novel_features.description: Score npm package maintenance and adoption risk with explicit signals.
